---
title: "Pipeline Metrics"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    code-fold: true
---

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}
{{< include ../../_includes/pages-nav.qmd >}}

Targets pipeline composition: plans, target counts, heaviest targets by size and compute time.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Plans & Targets

```{r pipeline-plans}
safe_tar_read("vig_pipeline_plans_table", wrap_df = TRUE)
```

## Top by Size

```{r pipeline-top-size}
safe_tar_read("vig_pipeline_top_size_table", wrap_df = TRUE)
```

## Top by Compute Time

```{r pipeline-top-time}
safe_tar_read("vig_pipeline_top_time_table", wrap_df = TRUE)
```

:::
